scene_description:
**Foreground to Background Description:**  

**Road Surface & Markings:**  
- The foreground features a narrow, dark gray asphalt road. The surface is smooth with visible texture. No lane markings (white/yellow lines) are present. The road curves slightly to the right.  
- On the left edge of the road, a light gray concrete curb borders a grassy area. On the right edge, a low concrete barrier (light gray) separates the road from another grassy area.  

**Left Side (Near Foreground to Midground):**  
- Adjacent to the left curb, a grassy area with mixed green and brown vegetation is visible. Taller, dry grasses and patches of low greenery cover the ground.  
- In the midground, to the left of the main building, a small, light-colored structure with a flat roof (resembling a shed) is present. Further left, a structure with a translucent or transparent roof (e.g., a greenhouse) is partially visible.  

**Center Background:**  
- A large industrial-style building dominates the center midground. It has two distinct sections:  
  - The left section (center-left) is white, made of corrugated metal, with three closed roll-up doors.  
  - The right section (center-right) is gray concrete, with a flat roof and no visible openings.  
- Behind the building, a low, dark structure (possibly a wall or fence) is partially visible.  

**Right Side (Midground):**  
- A wooden utility pole stands to the right of the building. It has horizontal crossbars, multiple power lines running across the image, and a small transformer box attached. Insulators are visible on the pole.  
- To the right of the road, a grassy area with short, dry, light-brown grass extends. The concrete barrier on the right edge of the road separates this area from the road.  

**Background:**  
- Densely forested, rolling hills cover the far background. The hills are covered in dark green vegetation (trees and shrubs).  
- The sky is clear and bright blue, with sunlight creating a slight lens flare on the left side of the image.  

**Additional Notes (Per Category):**  
- **TEXT & SIGNS:** No visible text, signs, or stickers on poles.  
- **INFRASTRUCTURE:** No bollards, barriers, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, or guardrails (other than the low concrete barriers on the road edges).  
- **VEHICLES & PLATES:** No vehicles or license plates are visible.  
- **BUILDINGS & ARCHITECTURE:** The main building has a flat roof; the smaller structures have flat roofs as well.  
- **VEGETATION & TERRAIN:** The terrain is hilly, with the hills covered in dense green forest. The foreground and midground areas feature grassy fields.  

*No objects from any category are absent in this description; only visible elements are included.*

details.name: wooden utility pole
details.reason: The presence of horizontal crossbars and a transformer box can help identify regional electrical infrastructure.
details.focused_description: The wooden utility pole is a tall, cylindrical structure. The upper section is light brown wood, smooth in texture and intact. A lower section has a gray material, but the wooden portion is the primary focus. A white band with three horizontal black markings is visible on the lower part of the pole. The pole's form is vertical and slightly tapered at the top.
